subject: chemistry
title: 19M.1.HL.TZ1.7
question_html:
Which series represents atoms in order of decreasing atomic radius?

A. N > C > Be > Mg

B. Mg > N > C > Be

C. Be > C > N > Mg

D. Mg > Be > C > N
examiners_html: Another well answered question with 75 % correctly ranking elements according to atomic radii. One G2 form stated that this question was repeated in paper 2.
